pr_text:
## Title: Fix signed/unsigned integer type mismatch in nr_get_ssb_start_symbol

### Summary
The `nr_get_ssb_start_symbol` function in `nr_parms.c` declared the local variable `mu` as a signed `int` when assigning from `fp->numerology_index`. This creates a signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatch since `numerology_index` is defined as an unsigned 8-bit integer type. This mismatch can lead to compiler warnings and potential incorrect branching behavior in downstream logic that compares `mu` ag
